steps.title: Fastest path: set up the shadow ratio
steps.content: Objects standing vertically at the same time form similar right triangles with their shadows because the sun's angle is the same for each object. Match height to shadow length for each object, then solve the resulting proportion.

steps.title: Set up a proportion using similar triangles
steps.content:
At the same moment, the sun's angle is identical for all objects. The radio tower and the flagpole each form a right triangle with their respective shadows. These triangles are similar, so the ratios of height to shadow length are equal:
$$\frac{\text{Tower height}}{\text{Tower shadow}} = \frac{\text{Flagpole height}}{\text{Flagpole shadow}}$$
$$\frac{520}{250} = \frac{h}{14}$$

steps.title: Choose the closest answer
steps.content:
$29.12$ feet rounds to $30$ feet. Evaluate choices:
  • A: $7$ - far below 29.12. Eliminated.
  • B: $18$ - difference of 11.12 from 29.12. Eliminated.
  • C: $30$ - difference of 0.88 from 29.12, the closest. C is correct.
  • D: $37$ - difference of 7.88 from 29.12. Eliminated.
